interactions.description: Combining warfarin and aspirin significantly increases bleeding risk. Both are anticoagulants/antiplatelets.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination unless explicitly prescribed by cardiologist. Monitor INR closely.

interactions.description: Alcohol with metformin increases risk of lactic acidosis, a rare but serious condition.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid alcohol while taking metformin. Inform doctor if you consume alcohol regularly.

interactions.description: ACE inhibitors (ramipril, enalapril) can raise potassium levels. Potassium supplements add further risk of hyperkalemia.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor potassium levels regularly. Avoid potassium supplements unless prescribed.

interactions.description: Antacids containing calcium, magnesium, or aluminum significantly reduce ciprofloxacin absorption.
interactions.recommendation: Take ciprofloxacin 2 hours before or 6 hours after antacids.

interactions.description: Grapefruit juice inhibits CYP3A4 enzyme, increasing statin blood levels and risk of muscle damage (myopathy).
interactions.recommendation: Avoid grapefruit juice while taking atorvastatin, simvastatin, or lovastatin.

interactions.description: NSAIDs (ibuprofen, diclofenac) can reduce effectiveness of blood pressure medications and worsen kidney function.
interactions.recommendation: Use paracetamol instead of NSAIDs for pain if on antihypertensives. Monitor BP regularly.

interactions.description: NSAIDs can increase methotrexate toxicity by reducing its renal excretion, leading to serious side effects.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid NSAIDs while on methotrexate. Consult doctor immediately if both prescribed.

interactions.description: Combining SSRIs with tramadol can cause serotonin syndrome — a potentially life-threatening condition.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination. Inform all doctors about all medications being taken.

interactions.description: Amiodarone increases digoxin levels significantly, leading to digoxin toxicity (nausea, arrhythmia).
interactions.recommendation: Reduce digoxin dose by 50% when starting amiodarone. Monitor digoxin levels closely.

interactions.description: Combining sildenafil (Viagra) with nitrates causes severe blood pressure drop, potentially fatal.
interactions.recommendation: Absolutely contraindicated. Never combine. Inform cardiologist about all medications.
